(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

item.title: GODSPEED MODE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED MODE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED MODE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h2][color=#FF0000] GODSPEED [/color][color=#008000]MODE [/color][/h2]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b] COMBO [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1733388/]1.GSM PROFILE manager [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS 4 PROFILES AND THIS IS PART OF GODSPEED MODE [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]2.GSM ZRAM [/url]
[b] INCREASE YOUR RAM UP TO 20 GB [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/1664811/]3.GSGCC [/url]
[b] IT WILL CLEAN GPU CACHE [/b]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[read more]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]
[color=#008000]Introducing Godspeed Mode, the ultimate Magisk module that catapults your Android device into overdrive! With its sleek and dynamic design, this mod unleashes a whirlwind of performance and power, all at your fingertips.

Prepare to be amazed by the four awe-inspiring profiles offered by Godspeed Mode: Balance, Battery, Ultra Battery, and Gaming. Each profile is meticulously crafted to suit your specific needs, delivering a harmonious blend of efficiency and excitement. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]Immerse yourself in the Balance profile, where equilibrium reigns supreme. It gracefully balances your device's performance and battery life, allowing you to seamlessly navigate through your day without compromising on power. [/color]

Step into the Battery profile, where energy conservation takes center stage. With ingenious optimizations and system tweaks, your device will stay powered up for extended periods, ensuring you never miss a beat. [/color]

[color=#0000FF]For the adventurers seeking maximum battery savings, the Ultra Battery profile takes you on an unparalleled journey. By fine-tuning system resources and minimizing power consumption, it propels your device's endurance to extraordinary levels. [/color]

[color=#800080]Calling all gamers! Strap in for the Gaming profile, purpose-built for the gaming connoisseur within you. Unlock the FPS on a remarkable selection of over 20 games, immersing yourself in a realm of unrivaled smoothness and unparalleled responsiveness. And as if that weren't enough, tweak your device's screen resolution to witness graphics like never before.

With Godspeed Mode, your Android device becomes a realm of endless possibilities. Navigate through the vast array of 40 terminal options, granting you unparalleled control over every aspect of your device. Customize screen resolutions, fine-tune system parameters, optimize CPU performance, and much more, all with effortless elegance.

But wait, there's more! Unleash the true potential of your device by clearing background apps, liberating valuable system resources. Experience the exhilaration of a lightning-fast device as Godspeed Mode utilizes its arsenal of optimization techniques, skyrocketing your device's speed and responsiveness to unimaginable heights.

Dare to venture into the world of Godspeed Mode, where style meets substance and performance knows no bounds. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey, where your device becomes a force to be reckoned with. Let Godspeed Mode redefine what you thought was possible and elevate your Android experience to new dimensions. [/color]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[read more]

item.title: GSM ADDON [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GSM ADDON [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GSM ADDON
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
This is terminal command tool for Godspeed Mode ROR or upcomming builds
terminal command = su -c ror

Title: Unveiling the GSM RoR Addon: A Crucial Extension of the Godspeed Mode Magisk Module

Introduction:

In the ever-evolving world of Android customization, Magisk modules stand out as powerful tools that enable users to enhance and modify their device's functionality. Among these, the Godspeed Mode Magisk module has gained significant attention for its ability to optimize device performance. However, the module's expansive nature has led to the emergence of an essential add-on known as the GSM RoR Addon. In this article, we delve into the intricacies of the GSM RoR Addon, understanding its role, significance, and the reasons behind its separation from the Godspeed Mode module.

Understanding Godspeed Mode Magisk Module:

The Godspeed Mode Magisk module, codenamed "Sukuna's Rebirth," has established itself as a massive and ambitious project aimed at revolutionizing the Android user experience. This module encompasses a range of optimizations, tweaks, and features designed to boost device performance, enhance battery life, and provide an overall smoother user interface.

Challenges in Managing a Massive Project:

The sheer scale and complexity of the Godspeed Mode module present challenges in terms of bug identification and timely updates. With such a comprehensive set of optimizations, the task of pinpointing bugs and ensuring seamless integration with various Android devices become increasingly daunting. In response to these challenges, the developers have introduced the GSM RoR Addon, a standalone extension that addresses specific aspects of the Godspeed Mode's functionality.

GSM RoR Addon: A Specialized Solution:

The GSM RoR Addon, standing for "Global System for Mobile Communications - Rebirth of Revolution," is tailored to address specific functionalities within the Godspeed Mode Magisk module. By separating this add-on, developers can focus more precisely on refining and updating individual components, ensuring a more efficient bug tracking and resolution process.

Terminal Command Evolution: su -c ror

One notable change accompanying the introduction of the GSM RoR Addon is the separation of the terminal command. Previously, users would invoke the Godspeed Mode functionality with the command "su -c ror." However, with the advent of the GSM RoR Addon, this command has been refined to cater specifically to the new addon's features and optimizations.

Significance of the GSM RoR Addon:

The GSM RoR Addon's separation from the Godspeed Mode module signifies a strategic move to streamline development efforts, improve bug tracking, and facilitate more frequent updates. Users can expect a more targeted approach to troubleshooting and optimization, resulting in an overall enhanced Android experience.

Conclusion:

As the Android customization community continues to thrive, the evolution of Magisk modules like Godspeed Mode and its dedicated add-ons reflects a commitment to delivering cutting-edge performance enhancements. The GSM RoR Addon, with its specialized focus and refined terminal command, stands as a testament to the developers' dedication to addressing the challenges posed by the sheer magnitude of the Godspeed Mode Magisk module. Users can look forward to a more responsive and optimized Android experience, thanks to the continued innovation and refinement of these essential tools.
[read more]
item.description:
GSM ADDON
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
This is terminal command tool for Godspeed Mode ROR or upcomming builds
terminal command = su -c ror

Title: Unveiling the GSM RoR Addon: A Crucial Extension of the Godspeed Mode Magisk Module

Introduction:

In the ever-evolving world of Android customization, Magisk modules stand out as powerful tools that enable users to enhance and modify their device's functionality. Among these, the Godspeed Mode Magisk module has gained significant attention for its ability to optimize device performance. However, the module's expansive nature has led to the emergence of an essential add-on known as the GSM RoR Addon. In this article, we delve into the intricacies of the GSM RoR Addon, understanding its role, significance, and the reasons behind its separation from the Godspeed Mode module.

Understanding Godspeed Mode Magisk Module:

The Godspeed Mode Magisk module, codenamed "Sukuna's Rebirth," has established itself as a massive and ambitious project aimed at revolutionizing the Android user experience. This module encompasses a range of optimizations, tweaks, and features designed to boost device performance, enhance battery life, and provide an overall smoother user interface.

Challenges in Managing a Massive Project:

The sheer scale and complexity of the Godspeed Mode module present challenges in terms of bug identification and timely updates. With such a comprehensive set of optimizations, the task of pinpointing bugs and ensuring seamless integration with various Android devices become increasingly daunting. In response to these challenges, the developers have introduced the GSM RoR Addon, a standalone extension that addresses specific aspects of the Godspeed Mode's functionality.

GSM RoR Addon: A Specialized Solution:

The GSM RoR Addon, standing for "Global System for Mobile Communications - Rebirth of Revolution," is tailored to address specific functionalities within the Godspeed Mode Magisk module. By separating this add-on, developers can focus more precisely on refining and updating individual components, ensuring a more efficient bug tracking and resolution process.

Terminal Command Evolution: su -c ror

One notable change accompanying the introduction of the GSM RoR Addon is the separation of the terminal command. Previously, users would invoke the Godspeed Mode functionality with the command "su -c ror." However, with the advent of the GSM RoR Addon, this command has been refined to cater specifically to the new addon's features and optimizations.

Significance of the GSM RoR Addon:

The GSM RoR Addon's separation from the Godspeed Mode module signifies a strategic move to streamline development efforts, improve bug tracking, and facilitate more frequent updates. Users can expect a more targeted approach to troubleshooting and optimization, resulting in an overall enhanced Android experience.

Conclusion:

As the Android customization community continues to thrive, the evolution of Magisk modules like Godspeed Mode and its dedicated add-ons reflects a commitment to delivering cutting-edge performance enhancements. The GSM RoR Addon, with its specialized focus and refined terminal command, stands as a testament to the developers' dedication to addressing the challenges posed by the sheer magnitude of the Godspeed Mode Magisk module. Users can look forward to a more responsive and optimized Android experience, thanks to the continued innovation and refinement of these essential tools.

item.content:encoded:
GSM ADDON
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
This is terminal command tool for Godspeed Mode ROR or upcomming builds
terminal command = su -c ror

Title: Unveiling the GSM RoR Addon: A Crucial Extension of the Godspeed Mode Magisk Module

Introduction:

In the ever-evolving world of Android customization, Magisk modules stand out as powerful tools that enable users to enhance and modify their device's functionality. Among these, the Godspeed Mode Magisk module has gained significant attention for its ability to optimize device performance. However, the module's expansive nature has led to the emergence of an essential add-on known as the GSM RoR Addon. In this article, we delve into the intricacies of the GSM RoR Addon, understanding its role, significance, and the reasons behind its separation from the Godspeed Mode module.

Understanding Godspeed Mode Magisk Module:

The Godspeed Mode Magisk module, codenamed "Sukuna's Rebirth," has established itself as a massive and ambitious project aimed at revolutionizing the Android user experience. This module encompasses a range of optimizations, tweaks, and features designed to boost device performance, enhance battery life, and provide an overall smoother user interface.

Challenges in Managing a Massive Project:

The sheer scale and complexity of the Godspeed Mode module present challenges in terms of bug identification and timely updates. With such a comprehensive set of optimizations, the task of pinpointing bugs and ensuring seamless integration with various Android devices become increasingly daunting. In response to these challenges, the developers have introduced the GSM RoR Addon, a standalone extension that addresses specific aspects of the Godspeed Mode's functionality.

GSM RoR Addon: A Specialized Solution:

The GSM RoR Addon, standing for "Global System for Mobile Communications - Rebirth of Revolution," is tailored to address specific functionalities within the Godspeed Mode Magisk module. By separating this add-on, developers can focus more precisely on refining and updating individual components, ensuring a more efficient bug tracking and resolution process.

Terminal Command Evolution: su -c ror

One notable change accompanying the introduction of the GSM RoR Addon is the separation of the terminal command. Previously, users would invoke the Godspeed Mode functionality with the command "su -c ror." However, with the advent of the GSM RoR Addon, this command has been refined to cater specifically to the new addon's features and optimizations.

Significance of the GSM RoR Addon:

The GSM RoR Addon's separation from the Godspeed Mode module signifies a strategic move to streamline development efforts, improve bug tracking, and facilitate more frequent updates. Users can expect a more targeted approach to troubleshooting and optimization, resulting in an overall enhanced Android experience.

Conclusion:

As the Android customization community continues to thrive, the evolution of Magisk modules like Godspeed Mode and its dedicated add-ons reflects a commitment to delivering cutting-edge performance enhancements. The GSM RoR Addon, with its specialized focus and refined terminal command, stands as a testament to the developers' dedication to addressing the challenges posed by the sheer magnitude of the Godspeed Mode Magisk module. Users can look forward to a more responsive and optimized Android experience, thanks to the continued innovation and refinement of these essential tools.

item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Repair Android Data
(Utilities)
Get Download Repair Android Data application from site www.repairmemorycard.com that renders most innovative option for users in reestablishing their damaged word files from any Android media without wasting your time and efforts. Data recovery program does not need any prior knowledge from sophisticated users to operate it. Site www.repairmemorycard.com assists Repair Android Data program that effectively regains birthday pictures, wedding anniversary, parties or other occasional photographs from any logically crashed device in easy, secure and fastest way.

item.title: Neutrino Kernels For Begonia [323 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Neutrino Kernels For Begonia [323 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: zycromerz
item.itunes:summary:
Neutrino Kernels For Begonia [323 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel for Begonia
* Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
* Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
* Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
* SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
* Stock : minimal tweak,should be close to same as stock
* Q-OSS : for miui/aosp based fw miui A10 (miui 12/miui 11 a10) + added new front cam drivers
* R-OSS : for miui/aosp based fw miui A11 (miui 12.5)
* Flamescion : non uv kernels
* Phantasm : uv Big -20mV Little -30mV GPU -50mV

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1914616/
[read more]

* Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
* Dtc : for more performance and more overheat

* Flamescion : non uv kernels

item.title: Digital Camera Data Restroation Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Data Restroation Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Data Restroation Tool
(Utilities)
Cost effective Repair Digital Camera software is perfect solution to recover multiple deleted images and easily downloaded from www.repairmemorycard.com. Picture rescue tool has ability to restore lost images, desktop wallpaper and video files from corrupted digital media. Camera recover software provides advance technology to scan and find out missing photographs that lost from formatted memory card. Revolutionary Repair Digital Camera software is easily found from most popular website www.repairmemorycard.com to recover mistakenly erased digital photographs, pictures and other files and folders. Image retrieval tool is fully capable to recue user missing wedding and birthday images from corrupted camera storage device.

[read more]

item.title: Phone Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Phone Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Phone Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Professional www.repairmemorycard.com website offers best solution to find and rescue erased images from mobile phone memory in few mouse clicks. Useful Mobile Phone Repair Software regains all lost photos due to hardware failure from cell phone device in simplified manner. Advanced cell phone recovery utility enables user to retrieve accidentally erased digital pictures video films saved in mobile phones in cost-effective manner. Simple to use recovery software for mobile phone to get back corrupted audio video clips digital images from cell phone memory quickly. Automatic recovery tool for cell phone has user-friendly interface to get back missing files during transforming data from mobile phone memory to PC or laptop in an accurate manner. Windows based cell phone recovery application restores erased jpg, gif digital pictures due to virus attack in mobile phone memory card in real time. Quality and affordable phone recovery program saves valuable data from bad sector of cell phone memory card in few minutes. Enhanced recovery program for cell phone restores corrupted pictures videos due to improper mobile phone usages in simple steps.Feature* Professional mobile phone recovery program provides standard recovery searches to restore lost images videos from cell phone in few mouse clicks.* New cell phone recovery program restores data erased due to command line deletion from mobile phone memory card in quick time.* Windows based recovery software for cell phone repairs all lost images from formatted mobile phone memory card in less time.* Cost-effective mobile phone recovery software is reliable and flexible to get back data lost due to virus attack in phone memory successfully.* Advanced mobile phone recovery application retrieves important photos videos from bad sector of phone memory in minimal time.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Rounded screen corners [Qt Tools]
item.itunes:title: Rounded screen corners [Qt Tools]
item.itunes:author: piotrintes
item.itunes:summary:
Rounded screen corners
(Qt Tools)
This is a simple app that will add rounded screen corners to your desktop. It was designed to work with KDE, but might work on other DEs as well.
INSTALLING:
- install Qt 5.12.4 or newer (if you are using KDE, skip this step)
- unpack to any directory you wish
- add activate.sh to automatic startup

RUNNING MANUALLY:
- run activate.sh

For best experience it is recommended to set some windows rules:

SETUP #1 (simpler, without corners overlapping panels):
- Go to systems settings/windows/windows rules
- Add new rule for application "roudedscreencorners"
- Add attributes:
-- Virtual desktops: Force, All desktops (to keep rounded corners on all desktops)
-- Always on top: Force, Yes (To make them stay above applications)
-- Accept focus: Force, No (To prevent steeling focus when you click at them)

SETUP #2 (overlapping panels):
- Do setup #1
- Add new rules for corners that should overlap panels. Corners have window titles: Left_Top, Right_Top, Left_Bottom or Right_Bottom
- For each of them add attribute Position, Force, position:
-- Left_Top: 0 X 0
-- Right_Top: - 24 X 0
-- Left_Bottom: 0 X - 24
-- Right_Bottom: - 24 X - 24
- In activate.sh script remove # from third line (script will have to be activated after panels are drown)

WAYLAND bugfix:
- In activate.sh, in lines 4-7 you need to insert QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb before each command (fixes the corners positions)
- Add additional rule to application to prevent showing the app in taskbar (removes the task bar items for the corners)
[read more]
item.description:
Rounded screen corners
(Qt Tools)
This is a simple app that will add rounded screen corners to your desktop. It was designed to work with KDE, but might work on other DEs as well.
INSTALLING:
- install Qt 5.12.4 or newer (if you are using KDE, skip this step)
- unpack to any directory you wish
- add activate.sh to automatic startup

RUNNING MANUALLY:
- run activate.sh

For best experience it is recommended to set some windows rules:

SETUP #1 (simpler, without corners overlapping panels):
- Go to systems settings/windows/windows rules
- Add new rule for application "roudedscreencorners"
- Add attributes:
-- Virtual desktops: Force, All desktops (to keep rounded corners on all desktops)
-- Always on top: Force, Yes (To make them stay above applications)
-- Accept focus: Force, No (To prevent steeling focus when you click at them)

SETUP #2 (overlapping panels):
- Do setup #1
- Add new rules for corners that should overlap panels. Corners have window titles: Left_Top, Right_Top, Left_Bottom or Right_Bottom
- For each of them add attribute Position, Force, position:
-- Left_Top: 0 X 0
-- Right_Top: - 24 X 0
-- Left_Bottom: 0 X - 24
-- Right_Bottom: - 24 X - 24
- In activate.sh script remove # from third line (script will have to be activated after panels are drown)

WAYLAND bugfix:
- In activate.sh, in lines 4-7 you need to insert QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb before each command (fixes the corners positions)
- Add additional rule to application to prevent showing the app in taskbar (removes the task bar items for the corners)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Rounded screen corners
(Qt Tools)
This is a simple app that will add rounded screen corners to your desktop. It was designed to work with KDE, but might work on other DEs as well.
INSTALLING:
- install Qt 5.12.4 or newer (if you are using KDE, skip this step)
- unpack to any directory you wish
- add activate.sh to automatic startup

RUNNING MANUALLY:
- run activate.sh

For best experience it is recommended to set some windows rules:

SETUP #1 (simpler, without corners overlapping panels):
- Go to systems settings/windows/windows rules
- Add new rule for application "roudedscreencorners"
- Add attributes:
-- Virtual desktops: Force, All desktops (to keep rounded corners on all desktops)
-- Always on top: Force, Yes (To make them stay above applications)
-- Accept focus: Force, No (To prevent steeling focus when you click at them)

SETUP #2 (overlapping panels):
- Do setup #1
- Add new rules for corners that should overlap panels. Corners have window titles: Left_Top, Right_Top, Left_Bottom or Right_Bottom
- For each of them add attribute Position, Force, position:
-- Left_Top: 0 X 0
-- Right_Top: - 24 X 0
-- Left_Bottom: 0 X - 24
-- Right_Bottom: - 24 X - 24
- In activate.sh script remove # from third line (script will have to be activated after panels are drown)

WAYLAND bugfix:
- In activate.sh, in lines 4-7 you need to insert QT_QPA_PLATFORM=xcb before each command (fixes the corners positions)
- Add additional rule to application to prevent showing the app in taskbar (removes the task bar items for the corners)
[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: repairmemorycard
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Repair Memory Card Software is easily available at www.repairmemorycard.com website to restore overall missing, deleted or lost audio, video, text document, songs and other precious item from logically corrupted digital media storage devices. Memory Card Recovery Program retrieves missing photos, pictures, snap etc from multimedia memory card in all major data loss situation. Company provides www.repairmemorycard.com which offers you to download Repair Memory Card Software recover mistakenly deleted files and folder from various types of memory card. Software provides facility to saves all recovered missing data at specific location on computer for further reference.

[read more]

Memory Card Recovery Program retrieves missing photos, pictures, snap etc from multimedia memory card in all major data loss situation. Company provides www.repairmemorycard.com which offers you to download Repair Memory Card Software recover mistakenly deleted files and folder from various types of memory card. Software provides facility to saves all recovered missing data at specific location on computer for further reference.

Memory Card Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Repair Memory Card Software is easily available at www.repairmemorycard.com website to restore overall missing, deleted or lost audio, video, text document, songs and other precious item from logically corrupted digital media storage devices. Memory Card Recovery Program retrieves missing photos, pictures, snap etc from multimedia memory card in all major data loss situation. Company provides www.repairmemorycard.com which offers you to download Repair Memory Card Software recover mistakenly deleted files and folder from various types of memory card. Software provides facility to saves all recovered missing data at specific location on computer for further reference.
